conbody.p: This manual is intended for personnel who interact with or are responsible for the Bi-directional Scalo 100 Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR).
The audience includes individuals involved in system operation, maintenance, safety supervision, and performance evaluation within the production environment.
The following user roles are addressed in this manual:

ul.li: Operators – Personnel who handle daily system operation and material handling activities.
Maintenance technicians – Personnel responsible for inspection, servicing, and fault resolution.
Safety officers – Personnel who ensure compliance with safety standards and operational guidelines.
Engineers and supervisors – Personnel who monitor system performance and workflow integration.

conbody.p: Each role uses relevant sections of this manual based on their responsibilities and level of interaction with the system.
